components.description: Semantic navigation wrapper for breadcrumb-style hierarchies.
components.intendedUsage: Indicate the user's location in a navigation hierarchy and allow easy traversal.

aria-label.description: Accessible label for the breadcrumb navigation container.

children.description: The breadcrumb items, typically composed of Anchor or Button components.

constraints: Only one item should visually indicate the current page.
Use semantic elements or ARIA to denote current page when needed.

components.description: Button component optimized for icon-only display.
components.intendedUsage: Create interactive icon buttons with proper accessibility.

accessibility.requirements: Must have aria-label for screen readers

components.description: Step-by-step navigation component for multi-step processes.
components.intendedUsage: Guide users through sequential tasks or processes.

icon.description: Custom icon in place of number.

iconProps.description: SVG props for default check icon.

components.description: Expandable/collapsible content panels for progressive disclosure and content organization.
components.intendedUsage: Display content in collapsible sections to reduce cognitive load and organize complex information hierarchies.

isCollapsible.description: Allow sections to be collapsed after expanding.

isBare.description: Remove default styling for custom implementations.

defaultExpandedSections.description: Array of section keys to be expanded by default.

onChange.description: Callback when sections expand/collapse state changes.

constraints: Nested accordions should be limited to 3 levels maximum.
Always include a visual indicator for expand/collapse state.
Section headers must be focusable and keyboard operable.
Panel content should be progressively enhanced for accessibility.
Avoid using accordions for critical information that users must see.
useCases: Product feature lists with detailed descriptions
bestPractices: Use clear, descriptive labels for section headers
Maintain consistent interaction patterns across accordions
Consider default expanded state for important content
Provide visual feedback during state transitions
Ensure content remains accessible when JavaScript fails

components.description: Visual representation of users, entities, or systems with support for images, initials, and status indicators.
components.intendedUsage: Display user profile pictures, system avatars, or placeholder representations across the interface.

badge.description: Badge count or text to display.

accessibility.requirements: Must include alt text for images or aria-label for non-text content

constraints: Images should be square for proper circular display.
Text content limited to 2-3 characters maximum.
Badge values over 99 should display as '99+'.
Status indicators must have sufficient contrast.

components.description: Interactive button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states.
components.intendedUsage: Trigger actions, submit forms, and navigate through the application.
constraints: Primary buttons limited to one per view/section.
Danger buttons require confirmation for destructive actions.
Link buttons should not be used in forms.
Disabled buttons must communicate why they're disabled.
Icon-only buttons require tooltip for accessibility.

components.description: Dialog overlay for focused content, confirmations, and complex interactions.
components.intendedUsage: Display content that requires user attention or decision in a layer above the main interface.

focusOnMount.description: Element to focus when modal opens.

restoreFocus.description: Restore focus to trigger element on close.

appendToNode.description: DOM node to append modal portal.

props.children: <><Header><Title>Confirm Delete</Title><Close aria-label='Close modal' /></Header><Body>Are you sure you want to delete this item?</Body><Footer><FooterItem><Button>Cancel</Button></FooterItem><FooterItem><Button isDanger>Delete</Button></FooterItem></Footer></>

accessibility.focusManagement: Focus trap with first/last focusable elements

constraints: Focus must be trapped within modal while open.
Must have clear close affordance (X button or Cancel).
Critical actions should not rely solely on modals.
Long content should be scrollable within modal body.

components.description: Data table component for displaying structured information with sorting, selection, and pagination.
components.intendedUsage: Display tabular data with support for interaction patterns like sorting, filtering, and row selection.

ux.scrollBehavior: horizontal scroll with fixed first column option

constraints: Tables should be responsive on small screens.
Sortable columns must have visual indicators.
Selection checkboxes should be in the first column.
Complex cells should use progressive disclosure.

components.description: Form container that provides structure and validation context for form controls.
components.intendedUsage: Wrap form fields to provide semantic structure and validation management.
constraints: Forms should have clear submission buttons.
Error states should be clearly communicated.

components.description: Form field wrapper that connects labels, inputs, and validation messages.
components.intendedUsage: Group form controls with their labels and help text for accessibility.
constraints: Each field should have a label.
Validation messages should be associated with inputs.

components.description: Text input field for various data types.
components.intendedUsage: Collect text-based user input including text, email, password, etc.
constraints: Must have associated label for accessibility.
Placeholder text should not replace labels.
Avoid using readOnly and disabled together.

components.description: Binary toggle control for selecting options.
components.intendedUsage: Allow users to select one or more options from a set.
constraints: Labels must be clickable to toggle.
Indeterminate state only for parent checkboxes.

components.description: Single selection control within a group of options.
components.intendedUsage: Allow users to select exactly one option from a set.
constraints: Must be used within radio groups.
Labels must be associated and clickable.

components.description: Dropdown selection component for choosing from predefined options.
components.intendedUsage: Allow users to select one or multiple options from a dropdown list.
constraints: Selected option should be visible in viewport.

components.description: Multi-line text input for longer content.
components.intendedUsage: Collect longer text input like comments, descriptions, or messages.
constraints: Character count should be shown for limited input.

components.description: Contextual overlay that appears on hover or focus.
components.intendedUsage: Display helpful information about interface elements.
constraints: Must be dismissible on touch devices.

components.description: Tabbed interface for organizing content into sections.
components.intendedUsage: Switch between related content views within the same context.
constraints: One tab must always be selected.

components.description: Contextual menu for actions and navigation.
components.intendedUsage: Display a list of actions or navigation options.
constraints: Must be dismissible with Escape key.
Nested menus should open on hover/focus.

components.description: System messages and alerts with various types and states.
components.intendedUsage: Display system alerts, errors, success messages, and informational notices.
constraints: Error messages must be dismissible by user.

components.description: Temporary notification messages that auto-dismiss.
components.intendedUsage: Display brief, non-critical notifications that don't require user action.

components.description: Interactive label component for categorization and filtering.
components.intendedUsage: Display removable labels, filters, or selected items.
constraints: Close button must have accessible label.

components.description: Visual indicator of task completion or loading state.
components.intendedUsage: Show progress of operations, file uploads, or multi-step processes.

components.description: Animated loading indicator for indeterminate progress.
components.intendedUsage: Indicate loading states when progress cannot be determined.
constraints: Avoid showing for very quick operations.

components.description: Placeholder loading pattern that mimics content structure.
components.intendedUsage: Display loading placeholders that match content layout.

components.description: Responsive grid system for layout structure.
components.intendedUsage: Create responsive layouts with consistent spacing and alignment.

props.children: <Row><Col sm={12} md={6} lg={4}>Column 1</Col><Col sm={12} md={6} lg={4}>Column 2</Col></Row>

constraints: Column spans must total 12 or less.
Nest grids carefully to avoid complexity.

components.description: Context provider for theming Garden components.
components.intendedUsage: Wrap application to provide theme context to all Garden components.
constraints: Theme object must follow Garden schema.

fontFamily.system: 'Proxima Nova', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

hooks.intendedUsage: Enable theme switching and system preference synchronization.

examples.code:
const { colorScheme } = useColorScheme();
const theme = { ...DEFAULT_THEME, colors: { ...DEFAULT_THEME.colors, base: colorScheme } };

hooks.description: Access the current theme object provided by ThemeProvider.
hooks.intendedUsage: Access theme values within styled components or functional components.
constraints: Must be used within styled-components ThemeProvider
When using with Garden, wrap app in Garden's ThemeProvider

hooks.description: Display toast notifications with programmatic control.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create temporary notification messages that auto-dismiss.

addToast.description: Function to add a new toast

hooks.description: Manage tooltip state, positioning, and accessibility.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create custom tooltip components with full control over behavior.
constraints: Tooltip must not contain interactive elements

hooks.description: Manage tab state, selection, and keyboard navigation.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create accessible tab interfaces with full keyboard support.
constraints: One tab must always be selected

hooks.description: Manage combobox state, filtering, and accessibility.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create custom autocomplete and combobox components.

hooks.description: Manage modal dialog state, focus, and accessibility.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create custom modal dialogs with proper focus management.

hooks.description: Manage menu state, keyboard navigation, and accessibility.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create custom dropdown menus and context menus.

hooks.description: Manage breadcrumb navigation state and accessibility.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create custom breadcrumb components with proper semantics.

hooks.description: Manage pagination state and navigation controls.
hooks.intendedUsage: Create custom pagination interfaces with accessibility.

hooks.description: Trap focus within a container element for modal dialogs and widgets.
hooks.intendedUsage: Manage focus trapping for modals, dialogs, and other overlay components.

examples.code:
const { getContainerProps } = useFocusJail({ containerRef });
<div {...getContainerProps({ ref: containerRef })}>

hooks.description: Animation timing hook for smooth transitions.

examples.code:
const elapsed = useSchedule({ duration: 1000 });
const styles = { transform: `translateX(${900 * elapsed}px)` };

hooks.description: Manage keyboard navigation and selection state for lists.
hooks.intendedUsage: Handle selection logic for menus, lists, and selectable components.
constraints: Keyboard navigation patterns must be followed

hooks.description: Manage accordion state and keyboard interactions.
hooks.intendedUsage: Control expansion state and accessibility for accordion components.

functions.description: Generate Garden standard focus styling CSS.
functions.intendedUsage: Apply consistent focus rings across components.

functions.description: Calculate optimal line height based on font size and component height.
functions.intendedUsage: Generate consistent line heights that work with Garden's typography system.
constraints: Height and font size must be positive numbers

functions.description: Generate CSS for a checkered background pattern.
functions.intendedUsage: Create transparency indicators or background patterns.

functions.description: Get color values using Garden v8 color system.
functions.intendedUsage: Access legacy v8 color values for backward compatibility.

functions.description: Get box-shadow value for focus states.
functions.intendedUsage: Create consistent focus indicators using box-shadow.

functions.description: Extract color values from theme with support for color modes.
functions.intendedUsage: Retrieve theme colors in styled-components or CSS-in-JS.

functions.description: Generate CSS media query strings based on theme breakpoints.
functions.intendedUsage: Create responsive styles aligned with Garden's breakpoints.

functions.description: Generate arrow CSS for tooltips, popovers, and dropdowns.
functions.intendedUsage: Create directional arrows for floating UI elements.

functions.description: Generate Garden-consistent menu and dropdown styles.

utilityComponents.intendedUsage: Enable toast functionality throughout the application.
Create selectable lists and menus with render props.
Enable light/dark mode switching throughout the application.

utilityComponents.description: Render-prop wrapper for focus trapping functionality.
utilityComponents.intendedUsage: Create focus-trapped regions for modal interfaces.
Create time-based animations with render props.
